title: Equipment Benediction
description: Add an exclusive Modifier, quality or set effect to any equipment or item.
body:
EquipmentBenediction development inspired by the famous game Terraria


If you are a Modpacks author, you may not be satisfied with the quality of vanilla items. There are better choices here. Maybe you are not satisfied with the blandness of weapons. The Custom Modifiers here can provide you with functions similar to Tinkers' Construct. Maybe you are not satisfied with a set of armor collected through hard work and can only provide simple protection. The EquipmentSet here will solve your problems. Now start your imagination to create exclusive equipment.


You can use KubeJS to add your own modifiers and qualities to any of your equipment or items.


Current Support
- Modifiers
- quality
- EquipmentSet


Current Compat
- Curios


Current Custom Modifiers Support
- add MobEffect
- add Attribute
- add bind Mod Bus Event
- add Exclusive Tick
- add Black and white list match


Current Custom EquipmentSet Support
- add MobEffect
- add Attribute
- add bind Mod Bus Event
- add Exclusive Tick
- add Black and white list match


Current Custom Quality Support
- Custom RecastingItem
- add Modifiers
